name: The New Zealand Natural Pet Food Co. Meow Green Lipped Mussels Freeze-Dried Cat Treat, 1.76-oz bag
description: Give your kitty the nutrients she needs to stay nimble with New Zealand Natural Meow Green Lipped Mussel Cat Food. This raw, freeze-dried food for cats features sustainably-farmed green lipped mussels that are high in protein, omega-3 fatty acids, glucosamine and chondroitin. It is crafted to be raw—without any of the wholesome enzymes or nutrients cooked out—to help support immunity, joint health and a shiny coat and skin. This single-ingredient cat food is the purr-fect way to reward your four-legged friend and can be served as-is or crushed over other food as a topper. It is developed to be paw-ticularly great for your sidekick’s sensitive stomach.

brand.name: The New Zealand Natural Pet Food Co.
